sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 30.7g. the fat quality is doing a lot of the work here. for seeds, the fat profile is one of the biggest reasons they earn their place.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 30.7g. the fat quality is doing a lot of the work here. for seeds, the fat profile is one of the biggest reasons they earn their place.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 16.5g. protein quality is a real strength here. protein is a bonus, but not enough by itself.
sections.subtitleText: protein is 16.5g. protein quality is a real strength here. protein is a bonus, but not enough by itself.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin e at 3% DV, vitamin b12 at 0% DV stand out most. that is barely moving the needle.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin e at 3% DV, vitamin b12 at 0% DV stand out most. that is barely moving the needle.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: magnesium at 80% DV, zinc at 42% DV, iron at 43% DV stand out most. that gives this food real mineral support.
sections.subtitleText: magnesium at 80% DV, zinc at 42% DV, iron at 43% DV stand out most. that gives this food real mineral support.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: the upsides first. extreme fibre density because adds standout digestive and satiety value even beyond the headline nutrient display. can be very filling for the amount used because the gel-forming fibre profile gives it practical fullness value. easy to add into meals because can be mixed into oats, yogurt, puddings, and smoothies without much friction.

sections.subtitleText: the upsides first. extreme fibre density because adds standout digestive and satiety value even beyond the headline nutrient display. can be very filling for the amount used because the gel-forming fibre profile gives it practical fullness value. easy to add into meals because can be mixed into oats, yogurt, puddings, and smoothies without much friction.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side. contains some anti-nutrients because phytates may reduce mineral uptake somewhat. texture can put some people off because the gel-like texture is not universally appealing. usually works best with some preparation because often needs soaking or mixing into something else to shine.

closing.summary: Chia Seeds has a genuinely strong overall case, especially extreme fibre density and can be very filling for the amount used. the downsides are there, but contains some anti-nutrients and texture can put some people off do not outweigh the upside. best as a support food that boosts meals instead of carrying them alone.
closing.useCaseNote: Best as a support food that boosts meals instead of carrying them alone.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?
